name: testColumnHeadersDisplayCorrectlyOnAllPages
description: Verifies that table column headers are displayed correctly on each page when navigating through paginated results.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'SUPER'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Uncheck 'Remember me' checkbox
Press 'Login' button

steps.name: Test disabled / Known bug: The column is not visible on the screen!
Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Acquirers' tab
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Select Rows Per Page '10'
Verify: All table column headers are on page '1' with '10' pagination
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Select Rows Per Page '25'
Verify: All table column headers are on page '1' with '25' pagination
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Select Rows Per Page '50'
Verify: All table column headers are on page '1' with '50' pagination
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Select Rows Per Page '100'
Verify: All table column headers are on page '1' with '100' pagination
